gold.title: Hero
gold.reason: Full hero section using @paper-design/shaders-react MeshGradient and PulsingBorder with Framer Motion — complete, production-ready hero block with animated shader border, not just a border effect.

gold.title: Joblisting Component
gold.reason: Full job listing UI with animated expand/collapse, company logo, salary, location, remote tag, and Framer Motion — production-ready section for careers pages; stands out as a real website block.

gold.title: Glowing Effect
gold.reason: Cursor's website-style glowing border effect for cards/containers — versatile, modern, widely applicable to feature cards and pricing sections on SaaS sites.

gold.title: Border Beam
gold.reason: Animated light beam that travels along container borders — polished, production-grade micro-interaction seen on top SaaS landing pages.

gold.title: Spotlight
gold.reason: Cursor-following spotlight effect — visually impressive, broadly usable on hero sections and feature cards; adds premium feel to any section.

gold.title: Omni Command Palette
gold.reason: Full-featured command palette (23KB) with Radix Dialog, search, pinning, history, theme toggle, and keyboard navigation — production-ready power-user feature for SaaS apps.

gold.title: Spotlight Card
gold.reason: Mouse-tracking spotlight card — high-impact interactive card suitable for feature grids and pricing sections on modern SaaS sites.

gold.title: Animated Glow Card
gold.reason: Animated glow card with hover effect — polished, versatile card component for feature or testimonial sections.

gold.title: Moving Border
gold.reason: Animated moving border for buttons/cards — distinctive, widely used on premium SaaS landing pages; great for CTA buttons.

gold.title: Dynamic Border Animations Card
gold.reason: Card with multiple dynamic border animation variants — flexible and visually rich, directly applicable to feature and pricing card layouts.

silver.title: Shine Border
silver.reason: Animated shine border effect — clean and widely usable on cards and containers; a staple border micro-interaction.

silver.title: shine-border
silver.reason: MagicUI's shine border implementation — solid quality, same concept as dillionverma variant; good for cards.

silver.title: Shine Border
silver.reason: Another shine border variant — functional, minor differentiation from the above two.

silver.title: Shine Border
silver.reason: ShadcnSpace shine border — fourth variant; still useful but increasingly redundant.

silver.title: Hover Border Gradient
silver.reason: Gradient border that expands on hover — versatile for interactive cards and CTA buttons.

silver.title: Hover Border Gradient
silver.reason: Blue radial glow rotating border button — polished interactive button with hover gradient, good for CTAs.

silver.title: Gradient Borders Button
silver.reason: Emerald-accented gradient glow button — stylish pill CTA button with animated borders.

silver.title: Aurora Button
silver.reason: Aurora gradient border button with glass background — elegant, modern CTA button for dark-themed sections.

silver.title: Border Trail
silver.reason: Animated border that moves along container edges — smooth effect similar to border-beam; good for cards.

silver.title: Animated Gradient Border
silver.reason: Animated gradient border container — clean and broadly applicable for card components.

silver.title: Animated Glowing Search Bar
silver.reason: Glowing animated search input — polished UI element useful for SaaS hero search or nav bars.

silver.title: Pattern Text
silver.reason: Pattern-overlay text component — interesting typographic effect for hero headings.

silver.title: Wave Path
silver.reason: SVG wave path animation — usable as a section divider or decorative border element.

silver.title: Lamp Tooltip
silver.reason: Tooltip with lamp/glow effect — beautiful micro-interaction; useful in nav or feature sections.

silver.title: Moving Border
silver.reason: Moving border variant — solid implementation; overlaps with aceternity version.

silver.title: dot-pattern
silver.reason: Dot pattern background with quote — minimal section background; useful but simple.

bronze.title: Neon Button
bronze.reason: Simple neon-bordered button — very basic, niche cyberpunk aesthetic, limited to specific brand styles.

bronze.title: Glowing Shadow
bronze.reason: Glowing shadow effect — decorative only, too simple to be a standalone component.

bronze.title: Smart Combo Box
bronze.reason: Combo box component — mislabeled as a border component; it's a form input, not a section-level block.

bronze.title: Toast Buttons
bronze.reason: Toast notification buttons — very specific UI pattern, not a website section block.

bronze.title: Bauhaus Card
bronze.reason: Bauhaus-style card — highly niche artistic aesthetic; limited use for mainstream SaaS/business sites.

bronze.title: Rainbow Borders Button
bronze.reason: Rainbow animated border button — too flashy/niche; not appropriate for most professional websites.

bronze.title: Avatar Border
bronze.reason: Animated avatar border — very small, single-purpose UI atom; not a website section component.

bronze.title: Multi Type Ripple Buttons
bronze.reason: Ripple effect buttons — button-level component only, not a section block; too niche for general redesign.
